title: LOUISIANA EXPRESSWAY LAW
doc_html:
CHAPTER 6.  LOUISIANA EXPRESSWAY LAW

§1251.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Expressway Law."

Acts 1954, No. 232, §1.
